nasb.text: Now they began the consecration on the first day of the first month, and on the eighth day of the month they entered the porch of the Lord. Then they consecrated the house of the Lord in eight days, and finished on the sixteenth day of the first month.

esv.text: They began to consecrate on the first day of the first month, and on the eighth day of the month they came to the vestibule of the Lord. Then for eight days they consecrated the house of the Lord, and on the sixteenth day of the first month they finished.

cnv.text: 他們在正月初一開始潔淨聖殿，第八日去到耶和華殿的走廊；他們用了八日潔淨耶和華的殿，到了正月十六日才完工。

ccb.text: 他们一月一日开始洁净的工作，到一月八日已经洁净到耶和华殿的走廊，又用八天洁净耶和华的殿，一月十六日完成洁净的工作。
